manifest.objective: Create a read-only controlled executor execution manifest proposal that stays blocked until explicit operator approval.
required_validation: Validate proposal schema and source decision report before approval review.
Confirm operator_approved remains false until an explicit approval token is supplied.
Confirm execution_started remains false before any controlled executor run.
Confirm registry writes, SQLite writes, worker execution, and model invocation remain disabled.
Confirm rollback precondition and manual review checklist exist before activation.
manifest.rollback_precondition: Manual rollback review must exist before any future controlled executor activation.

blocked_actions: using controlled executor activation execution-manifest proposal as operator approval
starting controlled executor activation from execution-manifest proposal
running worker execution from execution-manifest proposal
invoking a model from execution-manifest proposal
rollback_path: Discard this read-only controlled executor activation execution-manifest proposal; it did not persist registry, SQLite, worker, model, approval, or execution state.
next_safe_task: Add a read-only controlled executor activation execution-manifest proposal coverage report before any approval-token or execution path.
